description: The active pursuit and maintenance of optimal health in all dimensions. Wellness encompasses conscious choices for thriving, the integration of body-mind-spirit health, preventive care, flourishing beyond mere absence of illness.
rationale: The word 'thelani' flows from thoughtful 'the' through light 'la' to inner 'ni', using a fricative digraph. This three-syllable journey captures wellness as deliberate choices illuminating inner vitality.
